# Miami Design Residences

### **Midtown - Edgewater / 2031**

26 Stories / 143 Residences of
1 to 4 Bedrooms

**3995 N Miami Ave, Miami, FL 33127, USA**

Average Price: $2,000 x SF ($21,528 x M2)

The Miami Design Residences is a 26-story luxury condominium, located in the Design District Edgewater. It is comprised of 143 residences, and features five-star amenities. Residents enjoy carefully designed and spacious one-to-four bedroom residences. The Miami Design Residences is designed by the renowned architecture firm David Chipperfield Architects. The building's convenient location is within minutes from Downtown, Wynwood, Brickell, and the vibrant Design District. More information coming soon

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $1,400,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/miamidesignresidences/#contactform) for more information.

CONDOS FOR SALE

CONDOS FOR RENT

CONDOS SOLD/RENTED

Developed by Raycliff Capital, Fort Partners, Miami Design District Associates & Constellation Hospitality Group

This project is currently in pre - construction and prices start at $1,400,000. Please [contact us](https://miamiresidential.com/miamidesignresidences/#contactform) for more information.

## Features

### Building Features

- Private Motor Court
- Soaring 28-foot Lobby with Lounge
- 24-Hour Concierge
- Valet and self-parking below grade
- 70-foot Rooftop pool
- Rooftop Bar
- Shaded Seating areas
- Golf Simulator/Media Room
- Meeting Room
- Executive Lounge with adjacent terrace
- Entertaining Suite
- Catering Kitchen
- Outdoor Terrace
- Serenity Lounge with adjacent terrace
- Children’s Playroom
- Fitness Center
- Private Training Studio
- Dedicated Men’s & Women’s Spas
- Cold plunge
- Sauna
- Steam Room
- Jacuzzi
- Men’s & Women’s changing rooms
- Salon Suite for À La Carte Salon Services
- Residential storage bins available for purchase

### Residence Features

- Residential entrance doors with glossy aluminum hardware
- A selection of Porcelain flooring options
- Additional stone options available for penthouse residences
- Fully vented electric washers and dryers
- Terraces with porcelain tile flooring
- Custom designed Aluminum and glass railing
- Custom designed oak and wood lacquered kitchen cabinets by RDAI
- Quartz countertops and backsplash
- Stone countertops and backsplash (in penthouse residences)
- Specialty Hardware in Satin finished stainless steel
- Suite of Sub-Zero appliances. Including refrigerators/freezer, wine refrigerator, cooktops, wall oven, hood and microwave/speed oven, dishwasher
- Undermount garbage disposal
- Powder room and secondary bathrooms with Porcelain flooring, Stainless steel fixtures and Natural oak custom vanity with quartz countertop
- Primary bathroom with Countersunk oval tub with quartz top, Built-in showerhead set, Private water closet, Countersunk basin sink with quartz top and all of the powder room features

![](https://miamiresidential.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/02/20-MIami-Design-Residences-Living-Room.jpg)
